title: $30K Bonus | WSDiploma Auxiliary Police Officers | Paid Training
description:
Join us now, limited slots available!

PT Diploma in Policing & Security Management - TP (October 2026 Intake)

Study Laptops Provided

Our Auxiliary Police Officers are the frontline heroes who safeguard people, places, and the everyday moments that matter. If you’re someone who thrives on discipline, teamwork, and a strong sense of duty — this is where your journey begins.

Responsibilities:

  • Safeguard key installations, airports, and critical infrastructure
  • Escort persons and valuable assets
  • Maintain order and security at major events
  • Enforce laws and maintain public order
  • Respond to incidents with confidence and professionalism
  • Work closely with a strong, supportive team that always has your back

 Salary & Benefits:

  • Monthly Gross Salary up to $4,186
  • Attractive Completion Bonus of $30,000
  • Choice of East/West Base
  • Fully sponsored suite of training provided — no experience needed
  • Stable career growth with clear progression pathways
  • Comprehensive medical and insurance coverage
  • Attractive staff benefits with corporate partners
  • Annual increment & leave benefits

Requirements:

  • Minimum 3 O Level Credits/Nitec GPA >2.0/Higher Nitec in any Discipline
  • Able to work shift duties
  • Able to pass IPPT (training provided)
  • Strong sense of responsibility and discipline
  • No experience? No problem — we’ll train you to be your best

 Step Into a Career with Meaning

If you’ve always wanted a stable, uniformed career with real impact, this is your chance to step forward.

👉 Apply now and become the force that keeps Singapore safe. Your uniform. Your purpose. Your Certis career begins today.

postedCompany.description:
Certis is a leading outsourced services partner that designs, builds and operates multi-disciplinary smart security and integrated services. Our multi-service offerings leverage our strong heritage in security, and are augmented by applied AI solutions. These solutions are part of our comprehensive technology development and systems integration capabilities that are fully cyber secure by design.

At Certis, we seamlessly orchestrate security, facilities management and customer experience for greater cost efficiencies that empower your future. We are committed to building a safer, smarter, better and more sustainable business for you.

As a diverse tech-led security organisation, team members enjoy job rotations within the wide Certis Group, with opportunities for continuous learning and the strengthening of skill-sets. Certis offers you a platform to shine in the operations realm and the chance to build meaningful relationships working together with like-minded colleagues.

Certis is headquartered in Singapore, with an international presence that extends to Australia, Hong Kong, Macau, China and Qatar.
postedCompany.name: CERTIS CISCO SECURITY PTE. LTD.
